verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Once my heart and soul were fettered By the binding chains of sin. But the Great Emancipator Set me free to worship Him.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Glory, glory, hallelujah, Blessed be His Holy Name! He's the Great Emancipator, That's the song of the Redeemed!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Like a lost lamb I was drifting Oh so helpless and alone, But the seeking Shepherd found me, Led me to my Father's home.
